Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$pk = Get-Content \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh\\temp-ec2-key.pub\\" -Raw
aws ec2-instance-connect send-serial-console-ssh-public-key --instance-id i-010fd7ece8d1670ca --serial-port 0 --ssh-public-key \\$pk --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev 2>&1
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$json = '{\\"body\\":\\"MODULE=LOGIN&ACTION=AUTENTICAR&Data={\\\\\\"email\\\\\\":\\\\\\"admin@softmed-v3.cl\\\\\\",\\\\\\"password\\\\\\":\\\\\\"Admin.1234!\\\\\\"}\\",\\"httpMethod\\":\\"POST\\",\\"requestContext\\":{\\"identity\\":{\\"sourceIp\\":\\"127.0.0.1\\"}}}'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\test-login.json\\", \\$json, [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII\)
aws lambda invoke --function-name softmed-v3-dev-api --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --payload file://\\$env:USERPROFILE/test-login.json --cli-binary-format raw-in-base64-out \\$env:USERPROFILE\\test-response.json 2>&1
Get-Content \\$env:USERPROFILE\\test-response.json
" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "aws ec2 describe-network-acls --filters 'Name=vpc-id,Values=vpc-06b64e957175df5b0' --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --output json" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$streams = aws logs describe-log-streams --log-group-name '/aws/lambda/softmed-v3-dev-api' --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --order-by LastEventTime --descending --max-items 1 --output json | ConvertFrom-Json
\\$stream = \\$streams.logStreams[0].logStreamName
Write-Host \\"Stream: \\$stream\\"
aws logs get-log-events --log-group-name '/aws/lambda/softmed-v3-dev-api' --log-stream-name \\$stream --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --output json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty events | ForEach-Object { \\$_.message }
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids i-010fd7ece8d1670ca --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].[PrivateIpAddress,PublicIpAddress]' --output text" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "aws ec2 describe-network-interfaces --filters 'Name=description,Values=AWS Lambda VPC ENI*' 'Name=vpc-id,Values=vpc-06b64e957175df5b0' --region sa-east-1 --profile aws-softmedDev --query 'NetworkInterfaces[].[NetworkInterfaceId,SubnetId,PrivateIpAddress,Status]' --output table" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
\\$r = \\$tcp.BeginConnect\('15.229.238.50', 3306, \\$null, \\$null\)
\\$ok = \\$r.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne\(6000, \\$false\)
if \(\\$ok -and \\$tcp.Connected\) { Write-Host '3306 ABIERTO' } else { Write-Host '3306 CERRADO' }
\\$tcp.Close\(\)
" 2>&1)
